message:
� Fix preflight check: use Array.isArray guard instead of || [] (#11123)

The preflight tool check called .filter() on a value that was truthy
but not an array. The API returns { tools: [...] } but the code expected
just the array directly. The (r || []) guard only protects against
null/undefined, not against non-array truthy values like objects.

Fix: Extract the tools property from the response and use Array.isArray()
to properly validate before calling array methods.

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
